title: tessenia ramosa
intro: Tessenia ramosa, also known as the forked-leaved clematis or Clematis ramosa, is a type of flowering vine native to Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Tessenia ramosa include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Tessenia ramosa can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and can also be used in poultices or salves to treat external injuries.
